start.1: a warm and sunny place filled with the fresh smell of herbs

0.0: Oh! You just found olive, how adorable olive!
0.1: Have you know that olive oil was once used as fuel for lamps?
0.2: Keep going and explore more plants!

1.0: Oh! You found the Canary Islands Candle Plant! It's a sneaky little imposter!
1.1: It looks JUST like a cactus… but surprise — it is not one at all!
1.2: And watch out! Its white milky juice can actually burn your skin if you touch it!
1.3: Keep going and explore more plants!

2.0: Whoa! You just discovered one of nature's most stylish plants, the Century Plant!
2.1: Most plants look sad when they dry out… but not this one!
2.2: Even when it dies, it keeps its beautiful shape and looks totally cool and decorative!
2.3: Nature's got great taste, doesn't it? Keep exploring!

3.0: Hey there, explorer! You just found a very useful plant, the Narrow-leaved Bottlebrush!
3.1: Did you know that some people actually use this plant to clean bottles?
3.2: It works like a natural scrubbing brush — no plastic needed!
3.3: Nature had eco-friendly ideas way before we did! Keep it up!

4.0: Oh my! You found an Arum Lily — but don't be fooled by that fancy name!
4.1: Here's a secret: it is NOT actually a true lily at all!
4.2: Even wilder — it can trap insects inside its flower… and every part of it is poisonous!
4.3: Beautiful but dangerous! Keep exploring, brave botanist!

start.0: Now we're in the Desert House
start.1: a very hot and dry land with lots of sand and almost no water!

0.0: Wow! You stumbled upon the whole Cactus family!
0.1: These tough guys are masters of survival in the driest places on Earth!
0.2: With their spines and water-storing stems, they are built to last!
0.3: So many different shapes and sizes to discover! Keep exploring!

1.0: Look on that small and cute cactus!
1.1: But despite its small size, it is still quite paintful to touch it.

2.0: Look at that fluffy treasure! You found Upland Cotton!
2.1: Did you know this soft fiber has been used for clothing for thousands of years?
2.2: It's the most common natural fiber in the world today!
2.3: From your t-shirt to your jeans, it's everywhere! Keep going!

3.0: Whoa! You found a Pebble Plant! It's playing hide-and-seek!
3.1: These clever little guys look exactly like stones to fool hungry animals!
3.2: But wait... if you look closely, you'll see a tiny flower peeking out!
3.3: Nature's best camouflage! Keep your eyes peeled for more!

4.0: Oh! You found the Golden Barrel Cactus! It's looking round and golden!
4.1: This spherical beauty is covered in sharp spines that glow in the sun!
4.2: It's a classic desert dweller that stores water like a pro!
4.3: Such a perfect shape! Keep exploring the desert wonders!

start.0: Here in the Mountain Forest House
start.1: it's cool and misty, with tall trees and soft green moss all around.

0.0: Hey! You just discovered the Coffee plant! Time to wake up!
0.1: Those little red cherries hold the beans that power millions of mornings!
0.2: From the tropics to your cup, it's a journey full of flavor!
0.3: Now that's a useful find! Keep brewing up new discoveries!

1.0: Yum! You found a Lemon tree! That bright yellow fruit is iconic!
1.1: Did you know lemons are packed with Vitamin C and used in everything?
1.2: From fresh drinks to cleaning products, they are super versatile!
1.3: Fresh and zesty! Keep exploring these citrus treasures!

2.0: Oh! You found a Kumquat! It's a tiny citrus powerhouse!
2.1: Unlike other fruits, you can eat the whole thing—skin and all!
2.2: It's sweet on the outside and tangy on the inside—a unique treat!
2.3: Small but mighty! Keep munching on new discoveries!

3.0: Wow! You found the Indian Clock Vine! It's a timekeeper of nature!
3.1: Its flowers open and close at very specific times of the day!
3.2: It's like a living clock that tells time with its blooms!
3.3: Nature's own schedule! Keep watching the vines grow!

4.0: Hello! You discovered the Tea Plant! The world's favorite drink starts here!
4.1: Every sip of green or black tea comes from the leaves of this bush!
4.2: It's been cultivated for centuries for its calming and refreshing properties!
4.3: A perfect brew of discovery! Keep steeping in new knowledge!

start.0: Finally, we arrive at the Tropical Rainforest House
start.1: A hot, wet jungle full of lush plants and..

0.0: Sweet! You found the Vanilla orchid! It's the source of that delicious flavor!
0.1: Did you know vanilla is one of the most labor-intensive crops to harvest?
0.2: Each flower must be hand-pollinated to produce those precious pods!
0.3: Pure magic in a pod! Keep tasting the sweetness of nature!

1.0: Whoa! You found the Vegetable Ivory Palm! It's nature's hard nut!
1.1: Its seeds are so hard and white, they were once used as real ivory!
1.2: Artisans carve buttons and trinkets from these tough seeds!
1.3: A sustainable treasure! Keep uncovering nature's secrets!

2.0: Look at that! You found Pavonia Multiflora! It's a floral showstopper!
2.1: With its delicate, fringed petals, it looks like a queen's dress!
2.2: These flowers bloom in clusters, creating a stunning display of color!
2.3: Royal beauty in the garden! Keep admiring the blooms!

3.0: Splash! You found the Water Hyacinth! It's floating on the surface!
3.1: This plant has beautiful purple flowers and swollen stems that keep it afloat!
3.2: While pretty, it grows so fast it can cover entire lakes if not managed!
3.3: A powerful water dweller! Keep exploring aquatic life!

4.0: Wow! You found the Blackburn Red Bell Tree! What a splash of color!
4.1: Its bright red, bell-shaped flowers hang down like festive ornaments!
4.2: It's a stunning sight that attracts birds and butterflies alike!
4.3: Nature's red carpet! Keep looking for more vibrant blooms!

5.0: Whoa! You discovered the Baobab! It's the giant of the savanna!
5.1: This massive tree stores thousands of liters of water in its trunk!
5.2: It can live for thousands of years and is often called the 'Tree of Life'!
5.3: An ancient giant! Keep exploring these legendary trees!

6.0: Hey! You found the Rice plant! It feeds half the world!
6.1: Growing in flooded fields, these grasses produce the grains we love!
6.2: From sushi to risotto, rice is a staple in cuisines everywhere!
6.3: A vital crop! Keep harvesting new knowledge!
